CONQUEROR.description:
[gold]Forge[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
[gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] deals double damage to {IfUpgraded:show:ALL enemies|the enemy} this turn.
SNAKEBITE.description:
At the end of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], gain {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [gold]Poison[/gold].
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
FRIENDSHIP.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Innate[/gold].
|}Lose {StrengthPower:inverseDiff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
SEVERANCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Soul[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], {IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].|and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].}
CLEANSE.description:
[gold]Summon[/gold] {Summon:diff()}.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:up to 2 cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].|1 card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].}
PARRY.description: Whenever you play [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold], gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to {IfUpgraded:show:40%|20%} of its attack.
HEIRLOOM_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose a Colorless card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgrade[/gold] it and a|A}dd a copy of that card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THE_SMITH.description:
[gold]Forge[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:25|15}.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] all copies of [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] in your deck and combat.
FEED.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If Fatal, ALL players gain {MaxHp:diff()} [gold]Max HP[/gold].
HAND_OF_GREED.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If Fatal, ALL players gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
THE_HUNT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If Fatal, ALL players gain a Card Reward
LARGESSE.description: Choose 1 of 3 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] |}Colorless cards. Give the chosen card to target player.
